title: Unstable SMP Marlowww's Warden Aura
description: Adds Marlowww's warden aura seen on the Unstable SMP
body:
**Adds Marlowww's Warden Aura Seen In ParrotX2's Video On The Unstable SMP**

**If A Player With The Aura Enabled Comes Within 100 Blocks Of Another Player, They Will Be Given Darkness For 15 Seconds And Will Hear A Heart Beat. All Players Affected By The Aura Cannot Be Affected Again For 3 Minute, The Timer Only Starts Ticking When There Are No Players With Aura Enabled Within 100 Blocks**

![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/684c5a6ba2ce005b292bacf9853f1f77a55f38fe_0.webp)

To Enable The Aura For Yourself Run The Command: _**/function aura:enable_aura**_

To Disable The Aura For Yourself Run The Command: _**/function aura:disable_aura**_


To Enable The Aura For Another Player Run The Command: _**/execute as <player> run function aura:enable_aura**_

To Disable The Aura For Another Player Run The Command: _**/execute as <player> run function aura:disable_aura**_
